UpdateFileset.instanceId: Short ID of the PFS instance that owns the fileset
UpdateFileset.filesetId: ID of the fileset to update
UpdateFileset.filesetName: New name for the fileset; omit to leave unchanged
UpdateFileset.blockQuota: Capacity quota in GB; 0 means unlimited; omit to leave unchanged; must not exceed PFS instance capacity
UpdateFileset.filesQuota: File count quota; 0 means unlimited; omit to leave unchanged; valid range: max(1,000,000, pre-allocated file quota) to 3,000,000,000 (submit a ticket if outside this range)
UpdateFileset.qpsLimit: IOPS limit (QoS); maximum IOPS for the fileset (excludes DIO); throttling triggers when usage reaches this threshold
UpdateFileset.bandwidthLimitMb: Bandwidth limit in MB; maximum throughput for the fileset (excludes DIO); throttling triggers when usage reaches this threshold
